tasks.title: Create FastAPI project directory structure
tasks.description: Set up the basic project directory structure for the FastAPI backend with appropriate folders for models, routes, services, and config
acceptance_criteria: Backend directory exists with proper structure
Folders: api/, models/, services/, config/, utils/
Empty __init__.py files in each Python package folder
README.md in backend root explaining the structure
test_steps: Check all required subdirectories are present
Confirm __init__.py files exist in Python packages

tasks.title: Create Python requirements.txt with dependencies
tasks.description: Create requirements.txt with FastAPI, LangChain, ChromaDB, sentence-transformers, BeautifulSoup, uvicorn, pydantic, python-dotenv
test_steps: Verify all dependencies are listed with appropriate versions

tasks.title: Create environment configuration module
tasks.description: Create config/env.py module to load environment variables for LLM provider, API keys, embedding settings, and ChromaDB path
acceptance_criteria: Environment variables defined: LLM_PROVIDER, OPENAI_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OLLAMA_BASE_URL, LMSTUDIO_BASE_URL, EMBEDDING_PROVIDER, EMBEDDING_MODEL, CHROMA_PERSIST_DIR
test_steps: Check validation for invalid provider values

tasks.title: Create .env.example file with all configuration options
tasks.description: Create .env.example file documenting all available environment variables with descriptions and default values
acceptance_criteria: Each variable has a comment explaining its purpose
Default values are shown as comments
test_steps: Verify all variables from config/env.py are documented
Check comments are clear and helpful

tasks.title: Create Pydantic models for API requests/responses
tasks.description: Create models/schemas.py with ChatRequest, ChatResponse, ScrapeRequest, ConfigRequest, and related models
acceptance_criteria: ChatRequest model with fields: message, game, build_context, conversation_id
ScrapeRequest model with game and depth fields
All models use Pydantic v2 syntax
test_steps: Test ChatRequest validation with valid data
Test ChatRequest validation with invalid data

tasks.title: Create ChromaDB connection manager module
tasks.description: Create services/chroma_db.py to manage ChromaDB connection and collection initialization with proper error handling
acceptance_criteria: Creates collection if it doesn't exist
Proper error handling for connection issues
test_steps: Verify collection is created or retrieved
Test error handling with invalid path

tasks.title: Create FastAPI application instance and main router
tasks.description: Create main.py with FastAPI app instance, CORS middleware, and basic route setup
acceptance_criteria: CORS middleware is configured for frontend origin
App title and description are set

tasks.title: Create health check endpoint
tasks.description: Implement GET /api/health endpoint that returns service status and ChromaDB connection status
acceptance_criteria: Returns appropriate status when ChromaDB is unavailable
test_steps: Verify response contains status and chromadb_status

tasks.title: Create local embeddings service using sentence-transformers
tasks.description: Create services/embeddings.py with LocalEmbeddings class using sentence-transformers all-MiniLM-L6-v2 model
acceptance_criteria: Model can be configured via EMBEDDING_MODEL env var
test_steps: Verify output is list of floats
Check error handling for invalid input

tasks.title: Create OpenAI embeddings service option
tasks.description: Extend services/embeddings.py to support OpenAI embeddings when EMBEDDING_PROVIDER is set to 'openai'
acceptance_criteria: Factory function to create embeddings based on provider
test_steps: Verify OpenAI embeddings require API key
Test embedding generation with both providers

tasks.title: Create embeddings factory function
tasks.description: Create get_embeddings() factory function that returns appropriate embeddings instance based on EMBEDDING_PROVIDER setting
acceptance_criteria: Raises clear error for invalid provider

tasks.title: Create vector store wrapper for ChromaDB with LangChain
tasks.description: Create services/vector_store.py that wraps ChromaDB with LangChain's Chroma vector store interface
acceptance_criteria: Supports metadata filtering by game version

tasks.title: Implement RAG retrieval chain with game filtering
tasks.description: Create services/rag_chain.py with LangChain retrieval chain that filters by game version and returns top-k results
acceptance_criteria: Accepts query, game version, and optional build context
Filters ChromaDB results by game metadata
Extracts and returns citations from source documents
Includes build context in retrieval if provided

tasks.title: Create LLM provider factory for multiple providers
tasks.description: Create services/llm.py with factory function to create LLM instances for OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama, or LM Studio
acceptance_criteria: Supports 'ollama' provider with configurable base URL
Supports 'lmstudio' provider with configurable base URL
Validates required API keys for each provider
test_steps: Verify API key validation for OpenAI
Verify API key validation for Anthropic
Check error handling for missing keys

tasks.title: Implement streaming response generator with SSE
tasks.description: Create services/streamer.py to generate Server-Sent Events stream for chat responses with tokens and item cards
acceptance_criteria: Emits 'item' events when items are referenced
test_steps: Test stream() method with mock LLM response

tasks.title: Create poedb.tw scraper base module
tasks.description: Create services/scraper.py with base scraper class for poedb.tw using BeautifulSoup with rate limiting
test_steps: Test fetching a sample poedb.tw page
Test error handling for rate limiting

tasks.title: Implement category page scraper for poedb.tw
tasks.description: Add method to scrape category index pages (Unique, Gem, Passive_Skill, etc.) and extract item/skill links
acceptance_criteria: Extracts all item/skill links from category page
Returns list of URLs with metadata
Returns structured data with titles and URLs

tasks.title: Implement item detail page scraper
tasks.description: Add method to scrape individual item pages and extract name, stats, image URL, base type, requirements, modifiers, and flavor text
acceptance_criteria: Extracts image URL from poecdn.com or poedb.tw
Returns structured dictionary matching ChromaDB schema
test_steps: Test scraping a unique item page

tasks.title: Implement game version detection in scraper
tasks.description: Add logic to detect and tag items as PoE1 or PoE2 based on URL patterns or page content
acceptance_criteria: Detects PoE1 vs PoE2 from URL structure
Validates game version from page content if needed

tasks.title: Create ChromaDB indexer for scraped data
tasks.description: Create indexer function to transform scraped item data into ChromaDB documents with proper metadata structure
acceptance_criteria: Accepts list of scraped item dictionaries

tasks.title: Create scraping job manager
tasks.description: Create job manager to track scraping progress, handle concurrent scraping, and report status
acceptance_criteria: Tracks job status (pending, running, completed, failed)
Persists job state to file or database

tasks.title: Create scrape trigger endpoint POST /api/admin/scrape
tasks.description: Implement admin endpoint to trigger scraping with optional game filter and depth parameter
acceptance_criteria: Accepts JSON with game and depth fields
Validates game parameter (poe1, poe2, or null for both)
test_steps: Test with game=null for both games

tasks.title: Create scrape status endpoint GET /api/admin/scrape/status
tasks.description: Implement endpoint to get current scraping status including progress and counts

tasks.title: Create last scrape timestamp storage
tasks.description: Create mechanism to store and retrieve last scrape timestamp for data freshness display
acceptance_criteria: Stored in separate file or database
Includes timestamp for each game version
test_steps: Verify separate timestamps for PoE1 and PoE2

tasks.title: Create data freshness endpoint GET /api/freshness
tasks.description: Implement endpoint to return last scrape timestamps with relative time calculations
acceptance_criteria: Returns separate timestamps for PoE1 and PoE2
Handles case when no scrape has occurred

tasks.title: Create chat endpoint POST /api/chat
tasks.description: Implement chat endpoint that accepts message, game version, and optional build context, returns streaming response
acceptance_criteria: Passes build context to RAG chain

tasks.title: Implement conversation history management
tasks.description: Add SQLite-based conversation history storage with messages table
acceptance_criteria: New conversation created on first message
Conversation can be retrieved by ID

tasks.title: Create config endpoint GET /api/config
tasks.description: Implement endpoint to return current configuration (LLM provider, embedding provider, base URLs)
acceptance_criteria: Returns base URLs for Ollama and LM Studio
test_steps: Verify all config fields are present
Check API keys are not exposed

tasks.title: Create config update endpoint PUT /api/config
tasks.description: Implement endpoint to update configuration (LLM provider, embedding provider, API keys, base URLs)
acceptance_criteria: Persists changes to environment or storage

tasks.title: Create React + Vite + TypeScript project structure
tasks.description: Set up frontend project with Vite, React, TypeScript, and basic folder structure
acceptance_criteria: package.json with React, Vite, TypeScript dependencies
Folders: src/components, src/services, src/hooks, src/types, src/utils
